tasks.title: Map 51 user slugs to JSON file paths
tasks.description: Produce a CSV/markdown manifest mapping each of the 51 user-supplied slugs (form `<type>-<slug>`) to: (a) the actual JSON file path under packages/seed/src/data/accommodation/<destination>/, (b) the canonical id field, (c) the accommodation type, (d) the destination. Save at packages/seed/docs/spec-119-slug-mapping.md (temporary). Validate by spot-checking 5 entries. Spec ref: §3.1.

tasks.title: Grep Admin/Web for unsafe accommodation.price reads
tasks.description: Run `rg "accommodation\??\.price" apps/web apps/admin --type tsx --type ts --type astro` plus equivalents. Classify each hit: (a) already safe (optional chaining or fallback), (b) unsafe (assumes presence). Output report at packages/seed/docs/spec-119-price-consumer-audit.md (temporary). Spec ref: §3.7.

tasks.title: Smoke-test omitted-price JSON against seed JSON Schema
tasks.description: Take ONE accommodation JSON, remove the `price` key entirely, run JSON Schema validation (the seed loader's validator or `ajv-cli` ad-hoc) to confirm the file still validates. Document the command and result. Restore the file. Spec ref: §3.4, R2.

tasks.title: Curate 10 Pexels URLs per accommodation type (8 types)
tasks.description: EXPANDED for variance redesign: curate 25 (not 10) Pexels URLs per accommodation type. 8 types × 25 = 200 URLs. The first 10 per type were curated in the initial pass; this expansion adds 15 more per type with the same rigor (content-verified, HTTP 200, no cross-type pollution). Spec ref: §3.2 (amended).

tasks.title: Write _image-pool.ts typed const
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/src/data/accommodation/_image-pool.ts exporting `IMAGE_POOL_BY_TYPE: Record<AccommodationType, ImageVariant[]>`. Each ImageVariant = { url, caption, description, suggestedRole?: 'featured' | 'gallery' }. Use named exports only. JSDoc on the const. Spec ref: §3.2.

tasks.title: Document the image pool in packages/seed/docs/image-pool.md
tasks.description: Write packages/seed/docs/image-pool.md documenting: (a) why the pool exists, (b) which types are covered, (c) how to add a new URL (Pexels search guidelines, rotation rules), (d) how seeds reference it (TS const for docs, JSON URLs hardcoded). Link from packages/seed/CLAUDE.md. Spec ref: §3.2.

tasks.title: Refresh camping image galleries via random per-accommodation assignment (15 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 15 CAMPING JSONs. For each accommodation: seed RNG with hash(id), pick 1 featured from the 25-URL camping pool, pick gallery count N in [5,24], pick N distinct URLs from the remaining 24. Validate JSON Schema after edit. Constraint: any two camping galleries differ in ≥3 URLs (statistically guaranteed with this approach, verified by T-025). Commit: chore(seed): refresh camping galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2, US-1.

tasks.title: Refresh apartment image galleries via random per-accommodation assignment (20 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 20 APARTMENT JSONs. Same algorithm as T-007 using the apartment 25-URL pool. Commit: chore(seed): refresh apartment galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2, US-1.

tasks.title: Refresh hostel image galleries via random per-accommodation assignment (10 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 10 HOSTEL JSONs. Same algorithm as T-007 using the hostel 25-URL pool. Commit: chore(seed): refresh hostel galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2, US-1.

tasks.title: Refresh hotel image galleries via random per-accommodation assignment (14 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 14 HOTEL JSONs. Same algorithm as T-007 using the hotel 25-URL pool. Commit: chore(seed): refresh hotel galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2, US-1.

tasks.title: Refresh cabin image galleries via random per-accommodation assignment (12 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 12 CABIN JSONs. Same algorithm as T-007 using the cabin 25-URL pool. Commit: chore(seed): refresh cabin galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2, US-1.

tasks.title: Refresh room image galleries via random per-accommodation assignment (13 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 13 ROOM JSONs. Same algorithm as T-007 using the room 25-URL pool. Commit: chore(seed): refresh room galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2, US-1.

tasks.title: Refresh country_house and house image galleries (20 files)
tasks.description: Apply the random-assignment script to all 11 COUNTRY_HOUSE and 9 HOUSE JSONs using their respective 25-URL pools. Commit in one shot: chore(seed): refresh country_house and house galleries via deterministic random assignment. Spec ref: §3.2.

tasks.title: Write plan-pricing-tiers.ts deterministic planner
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/scripts/plan-pricing-tiers.ts. Reads all 104 accommodation JSONs, assigns each to one of 4 tiers using a seeded RNG (seed = accommodation.id hash) so output is reproducible. Honors anti-clustering rules: every type has all-tier representation; no destination has >2 Tier 0; named additionalFees fields each appear ≥5x. Outputs CSV. Spec ref: §3.3.

tasks.title: Run planner; produce pricing-tier-plan.md
tasks.description: Run T-014 script, save output to packages/seed/docs/pricing-tier-plan.md (kept as the working plan; can be deleted in T-035 if not useful long-term). Verify counts match target distribution (10%/30%/35%/25% ± 5%). Spec ref: §3.3.

tasks.title: Define realistic ARS value ranges per type
tasks.description: Document ARS price bands per accommodation type (e.g., camping $3k-$15k/night, apartment $20k-$80k/night, hotel $30k-$150k/night) and fee ranges (cleaning typically 5-15% of base, securityDeposit 1-3 nights, pets fixed $1k-$5k). Save to packages/seed/docs/pricing-tier-plan.md or a sibling. Used by T-017, T-019, T-020 to set realistic numbers. Spec ref: §3.3.

tasks.title: Apply Tier 0 (no price) to ~24-28 entries
tasks.description: For each entry assigned to Tier 0 in T-015 (~25% of the 104 dataset), remove the `price` key entirely from the JSON. Validate against JSON Schema (T-003 already smoke-confirmed). Distribute across destinations so no destination has more than ~30% of its listings as Tier 0. Commit in batches by destination: `chore(seed): apply Tier 0 (no price) to <destination> accommodations`. Spec ref: §3.3, US-2. NOTE: with Tier 0 now at ~25% of the dataset, R1 (consumer crashes on null price) is HIGH probability — T-021/T-022 MUST be completed and merged before this task lands in staging.

tasks.title: Verify Tier 1 (base only) entries — no edit pass
tasks.description: For each entry assigned to Tier 1 in T-015, verify it currently has only `{ price, currency }` (no `additionalFees`, no `discounts`). If any have extra fields, strip them. Most will be no-ops since the current state is all-Tier-1. Spec ref: §3.3, US-2.

tasks.title: Apply Tier 2 (base + partial) to ~29-33 entries
tasks.description: For each Tier-2 entry (~30% of the 104 dataset), add EITHER 1-2 additionalFees (chosen by the planner for fee-field coverage) OR 1 discount (weekly/monthly/lastMinute). Use ARS ranges from T-016. Spread fee field choices so each named field is exercised ≥5× across the full dataset. Commit in batches by destination. Commit: `chore(seed): apply Tier 2 pricing to <destination> accommodations`. Spec ref: §3.3, US-2.

tasks.title: Apply Tier 3 (full stack) to ~19-23 entries
tasks.description: For each Tier-3 entry (~20% of the 104 dataset), add 3-5 additionalFees across different categories + 1-2 discounts. At least 3 entries across the dataset must use additionalFees.others[] (custom names like 'Asado service', 'Bike rental'). At least 2 must use discounts.others[] (custom names like 'Returning guest', 'Group of 6+'). Use ARS ranges from T-016. Commit in batches. Commit: `chore(seed): apply Tier 3 (full stack) pricing to <destination> accommodations`. Spec ref: §3.3, US-2.

tasks.title: Fix unsafe Web price reads if any
tasks.description: Apply fixes for each unsafe read documented by T-002 in apps/web. Options: optional chaining + i18n fallback (e.g., 'Consultá precio'), or guard clauses on the card/detail component. Add minimal tests if the affected component already has a test file. Spec ref: §3.7, US-5, R1.

tasks.title: Fix unsafe Admin price reads if any
tasks.description: Apply fixes for unsafe reads in apps/admin documented by T-002. Accommodation detail form must accept null/missing price without crash; show 'Sin precio definido' affordance. Spec ref: §3.7, US-5, R1.

tasks.title: Smoke pnpm db:fresh-dev end-to-end locally
tasks.description: Run `pnpm db:fresh-dev` from repo root. Confirm: (a) Postgres + Redis start, (b) schema push succeeds, (c) all 104 example accommodations seed without error including Tier 0 (no price), (d) `apply-postgres-extras.sh` runs cleanly. Document any errors. Spec ref: §3.7.

tasks.title: Test: image pool membership invariant
tasks.description: In packages/seed/test/accommodation-seeds-realism.test.ts, add a test that walks every accommodation JSON and asserts every featured/gallery URL exists in IMAGE_POOL_BY_TYPE[accommodation.type]. AAA pattern. Spec ref: §3.7.

tasks.title: Test: camping gallery uniqueness invariant
tasks.description: In the same test file, add a test that loads all CAMPING accommodations and asserts any pair differs in ≥3 gallery URLs (no near-identical galleries). AAA pattern. Spec ref: §3.2, §3.7.

tasks.title: Test: pricing distribution invariant
tasks.description: Test asserting that across the 104 accommodations: Tier 0 count ∈ [22,30], Tier 1 ∈ [22,30], Tier 2 ∈ [27,35], Tier 3 ∈ [17,25]. Compute tier classification inline (Tier 0 = no price; Tier 1 = price only; Tier 2 = ≤2 fees OR ≤1 discount; Tier 3 = ≥3 fees AND ≥1 discount). Spec ref: §3.7.

tasks.title: Test: fee coverage and others[] coverage invariants
tasks.description: Test asserting each of the 15 named additionalFees fields appears in ≥5 entries; ≥3 entries with additionalFees.others[] (length ≥1); ≥2 entries with discounts.others[] (length ≥1). Spec ref: §3.7.

tasks.title: Write check-image-pool-coverage.ts lint script and wire to package.json
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/scripts/check-image-pool-coverage.ts (CLI). Walks all accommodation JSONs and prints any URL not present in the pool. Add as `lint:image-pool` script in packages/seed/package.json. Spec ref: §3.2.

tasks.title: Run pnpm test --filter=@repo/seed to green
tasks.description: Fix any failures from T-024..T-028. Re-run until green. Confirm coverage hasn't regressed. Spec ref: §3.7.

tasks.title: Workspace pnpm typecheck and lint to green
tasks.description: Run `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint` at repo root. Fix any new errors introduced by T-005, T-014, T-021, T-022, T-028. Spec ref: §3.7.

qualityGate.typecheck: passed in @repo/seed; admin app has pre-existing routeTree.gen.ts errors NOT introduced by SPEC-119

tasks.title: Visual review: 3 random accommodations of each type in local Web
tasks.description: Boot `pnpm dev:web`. Open 3 random accommodations of each of the 8 types. Confirm: images render, featuredImage is type-appropriate, gallery shows variety, price block renders correctly for whatever tier the entry has. Screenshot evidence into PR description. Spec ref: §3.7, US-1, US-2.

tasks.title: Visual review: Admin detail for one Tier 0 and one Tier 3 entry
tasks.description: Open Admin → Accommodations → one Tier 0 entry. Confirm no JS error, price field empty with 'Sin precio' affordance, save works. Repeat for one Tier 3 entry (all fees + discounts visible and editable). Spec ref: §3.7, US-5.

tasks.title: Write PR description and delete transitory working docs
tasks.description: Draft a PR description that captures: (a) what changed (images + pricing), (b) tier distribution tally (actual counts vs target), (c) which 15 named additionalFees fields appear and how many times, (d) link to image-pool.md, (e) screenshots from T-031/T-032. ALSO: delete the transitory working docs that the PR description supersedes — packages/seed/docs/spec-119-slug-mapping.md (T-001), packages/seed/docs/spec-119-price-consumer-audit.md (T-002), packages/seed/docs/spec-119-t003-schema-smoke.md (T-003), packages/seed/docs/spec-119-t023-smoke.md (T-023), packages/seed/docs/pricing-tier-plan.md (T-015). KEEP packages/seed/docs/spec-119-image-pool-curation.md (linked from image-pool.md as per-URL historical reference) and packages/seed/docs/image-pool.md (permanent guide). Spec ref: §3, AC.

tasks.title: Update packages/seed/CLAUDE.md to reference the image pool
tasks.description: Add a short section to packages/seed/CLAUDE.md pointing to packages/seed/docs/image-pool.md and explaining the rotation convention. Spec ref: §3.2.

tasks.title: Open PR targeting staging with SPEC-119 reference
tasks.description: Open PR from `spec/SPEC-119-accommodation-example-seeds-realism` to `staging`. Link the spec. Confirm CI green. Spec ref: branch workflow in CLAUDE.md.
